  "findings": [
    "Spoil pile placed less than 2 feet from the edge of the excavation, creating a cave-in hazard and falling debris risk."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately stop work in the trench",
    "Move the excavated material/spoil pile at least 2 feet away from the edge of the excavation",
    "Re-inspect the trench protection system before allowing workers to re-enter"
  ],
  "rationale": "OSHA 1926 Subpart P (specifically 1926.651(j)(2)) requires that excavated or other materials be kept at least 2 feet (0.61 m) from the edge of excavations to protect employees from loose rock or soil falling or rolling into the excavation.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926.651(j)(2)"
  ]
